task_completion.visual_evidence: A lock icon appears next to the document title, or an 'Unlock' button is visible, indicating the document has been successfully locked.

task_completion.description: Access the comments section for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comments section, tab, or input area is visible on the screen.
The exact text 'Locked for Q4 compliance review - do not modify until review is complete' is visible inside the comment input field.

task_completion.description: Submit the comment so it is saved to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comment containing the exact required text is displayed as a posted/submitted comment in the document's comment history.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with the Nuxeo UI, without the use of terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The actions were performed on the correct document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document title 'Contract Template' is visible in the UI where the lock and comment actions are performed.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open or used to alter the DOM to show a fake lock icon or comment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template. The required comment text must be exactly 'Locked for Q4 compliance review - do not modify until review is complete'. Verify that the document displays a locked status (e.g., via a lock icon or an 'Unlock' button) and that the comment is successfully posted in the UI.
